title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NASSCOM Foundation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at NASSCOM Foundation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the NASSCOM Foundation family as a Curriculum Developer in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!
